label: FAIL
rationale: The target invokes StartTrustedSession on SMUID as the first and only step and returns SUCCESS. The cited rule requires StartTrustedSession/SyncTrustedSession, if used, to occur after the StartSession/SyncSession exchange, and says invocation at any other time SHALL return an error result.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target returns SUCCESS for StartTrustedSession after the session has already been ended. The cited ordering places StartTrustedSession in the session startup sequence after StartSession/SyncSession, and StartTrustedSession invoked at any other time must return an error result.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target invokes StartTrustedSession on AdminSP and returns SUCCESS. The cited method signature is SMUID.StartTrustedSession, so StartTrustedSession is a Session Manager method; using an SP UID target is not compliant with the specified method target.
